Package index

Search & discovery

Find datasets and the layers within them.

pdok_list_datasets()
List PDOK datasets
pdok_search_datasets()
Search PDOK datasets
pdok_list_layers()
List the layers within a PDOK dataset
pdok_search_layers()
Search the layers within a PDOK dataset

Loading data

Read a layer as an sf object.

pdok_read()
Read a PDOK layer as an sf object

Spatial filtering

Filter a layer by any polygon area.

pdok_filter_by()
Spatially filter an sf layer by any polygon

Geocoding

Look up addresses and place names.

pdok_geocode()
Geocode an address or place name with the PDOK Locatieserver

Basemaps

The official PDOK basemap as a map background.

pdok_basemap()
A PDOK basemap to use as a map background

On this page
